_source: IHKE3203S01 (預防接種紀錄 / 疫苗) — NHI response shape
_note: 6 vaccinations across flu (no batch number) + COVID-19 (BNT, Moderna, AstraZeneca with batch numbers). No PII in this NHI response. Every row pattern kept for adapter coverage (batch-present vs batch-absent; nested parens for bivalent vaccine). Sanitized 2026-06-12: dates year-shifted per file, provider/contact identifiers replaced with synthetics — rows are to be treated as fully synthetic.
